title: Cluster investigation advisory — YAML frontmatter
description: Each Phase 4 sub-agent writes agents/<id>-<slug>.md with a YAML frontmatter block followed by markdown prose. This schema validates only the parsed frontmatter; the prose body is free-form. The synthesizer (Phase 5) reads frontmatter for structured fields and mines the prose for narrative copy.

cve_count_investigated.description: How many of the cluster's CVEs the sub-agent actually verified. May be lower than the cluster's cve_count if some were dismissed as scanner noise.

fix_family.description: A = ship-now patch (override / dep bump, no breaking changes). B = staged upgrade (framework / Node major / base-image swap). C = containment + legacy modernization (multi-week rewrite or replace).

target_close_date.description: When this cluster's criticals will hit zero. Used by the synthesizer to anchor the forecast.

depends_on_cluster_id.description: Other cluster IDs this one is sequenced behind (e.g. ES migration must finish before FrenchFines starts).

confidence.description: Sub-agent's confidence that the recommended fix family + target date will land. low = surface significant unknowns in the prose body.

investigator.description: Sub-agent identifier or human investigator name.

scanner_noise_cves.description: CVEs the sub-agent dismissed as scanner noise (not reachable / wrong language detected / etc.). The synthesizer mentions these in the rationale bullets.
